inputs.label: Total Cost
inputs.businessContext: Total cost of goods or services before additional costs and discounts.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total cost of goods or services before additional costs and discounts.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ek maliyet ve indirimler öncesi mal veya hizmetlerin toplam maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtkosten der Waren oder Dienstleistungen vor zusätzlichen Kosten und Rabatten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût total des biens ou services avant frais supplémentaires et remises.

inputs.label: Additional Costs
inputs.businessContext: Extra costs such as shipping, handling, or setup fees.

businessContext_i18n.en: Extra costs such as shipping, handling, or setup fees.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nakliye, taşıma veya kurulum ücretleri gibi ek maliyetler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzliche Kosten wie Versand, Bearbeitung oder Einrichtungsgebühren.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais supplémentaires tels que l'expédition, la manutention ou les frais d'installation.

inputs.label: Discount (%)
inputs.businessContext: Discount percentage applied to the total cost.

businessContext_i18n.en: Discount percentage applied to the total cost.
businessContext_i18n.de: Rabattprozentsatz, der auf die Gesamtkosten angewendet wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de remise appliqué au coût total.

inputs.label: Tax Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Sales tax or VAT percentage applied after discount.

businessContext_i18n.en: Sales tax or VAT percentage applied after discount.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İndirim sonrası uygulanan satış vergisi veya KDV yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Umsatzsteuer- oder Mehrwertsteuerprozentsatz, der nach dem Rabatt angewendet wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de taxe de vente ou TVA appliqué après remise.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
